name: whats-new-for-devs-in-wp-70
description: Live demo plugin for the "WordPress 7.0: Novedades para desarrollo" webinar — showcasing the WordPress 7.0 AI Building Blocks (PHP AI Client, Abilities API, MCP). Starts with a Content Summarizer ability callable from the block editor via @wordpress/abilities.
author: JuanMa Garrido
